name: nhat-dev-toolkit
description: Multi-runtime toolkit for senior developer workflows

scripts.test:brainstorming: ulimit -n 4096 2>/dev/null || true; for test_file in skills/brainstorming/tests/*.test.js; do node --test "$test_file" || exit $?; done
scripts.validate: node scripts/generate-runtime-assets.js --check && node scripts/ci/validate-runtime-assets.js && node scripts/ci/validate-agents.js && node scripts/ci/validate-commands.js && node scripts/ci/validate-skills.js && node scripts/ci/validate-contexts.js && node scripts/ci/validate-global-instructions.js && node scripts/ci/validate-hooks.js && node scripts/ci/validate-handover-proofs.js && npm run test:brainstorming && npm run test:pair && npm --prefix infra run typecheck && npm --prefix infra/observability-index run test && node scripts/ci/validate-bin-smoke.js
